purpose: Fetch every KC form in a binder + the clientGuid lookup.

result.clientId: kcClientId (KC internal int — DIFFERENT from Axcess clientId)
result.clientGuid: per-client GUID — needed for DELETE form endpoint
result.lastUsedTitleGuid: titleId for the industry title in use

use_cases: Look up clientGuid for delete-form workflows
Inventory the binder for bulk-capture or audit
not_found_shape: A missing/wrong-guid binder returns HTTP 200 wrapping an inner error: {error:'Binder not found.', statusCode:404, message:'Resource not found'} — check result.id, never the HTTP status alone.
binder_guid_is_not_the_engagement_guid: The KC binderId CAN DIFFER from the platform engagementGuid: GetBinder by the engagement guid gives the wrapped 404 above; KC uses the engagement guid only for /Home/GetPermissions. Discover the true binderId from the KC tab's own GetBinder call on open. An earlier note blamed 'binder not created until first KC open' — that was the wrong-guid symptom, superseded by this entry.
